ModMetaData.name: Backstories Anthology
ModMetaData.author: simoe
ModMetaData.description:
A massive unified collection of 1,273 backstories from 12 community mods, carefully merged, deduplicated, and balanced into one cohesive, self-contained package. No original mods required.
=== WHAT'S INCLUDED ===
All backstories are fully translated (English), deduplicated, and prefixed with 'UB_' to prevent any defName conflicts. Works with RimWorld 1.5 and 1.6.
SOURCE MODS (all integrated, no dependencies): - Cybranian Backstories+ - 401 backstories (DimonSever000) - Before the Crash: Backstories - 206 backstories (Ostrich-Hungry) - Vanilla Backstories Expanded - 174 backstories (Oskar Potocki, Legodude17) - Seal's Backstory Collection - 137 backstories + 4 PlaceDefs (SneezingSeal) - Medieval Backstories - 107 backstories (Shenanigans) - More Backstories - 58 backstories (Ravinglegend) - Kurzaen's SNS Backstories - 56 backstories (Kurzaen) - Tribal Backstories - 55 backstories (Shenanigans) - Elderhood Backstories - 42 elderhood backstories (DimonSever000) - Apocalyptic Backstories - 25 backstories (Lovely) - Saito's Backstories - 12 curated backstories (Zaljerem/Saito Yui)
INTEGRATED SYSTEMS: - Reasonable Moods & Capable Backstories (Legator) - 8 backstory balancing patches applied directly. DLL, InteractionDefs, ThoughtDefs, and mood system included. - Elderhood Backstory System (DimonSever000) - Harmony DLL and patches included.
COMPATIBILITY: - 100% standalone - no original mods required - All DLCs supported (Royalty, Ideology, Biotech, Anomaly) - All backstories use UB_ prefix - no defName conflicts with any other mod - RimWorld 1.5 and 1.6 supported with separate load folders - Loads after all vanilla content and Harmony
See CREDITS.txt for full attributions and licensing details.
